metadata.title: Sneaking a Clean Double Kill With a Quick Side Peek in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Here’s a smooth moment where a quick side peek turns into a flawless double kill. Sharp timing and steady aim make all the difference in this intense fight.
Where do you like to catch enemies off guard in your games?

Got a sharp peek play? Drop your best clips in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
